CustomField.description: System-managed field that stores the active Salesforce namespace prefix for the NPPatch package (e.g., "nppatch"). Used internally by NPPatch code to dynamically construct fully qualified API names for custom objects, fields, and other namespaced metadata at runtime. Automatically set during package installation. Incorrect values will cause field reference failures across the application. Do not modify manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: System-managed. The namespace prefix used by NPPatch for dynamic metadata references. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Namespace Prefix
